requiredDocuments.name: Original passport
requiredDocuments.notes: valid 3 months beyond return date + minimum 2 blank pages

requiredDocuments.name: Schengen photo
requiredDocuments.notes: 35x45mm, white background, taken within last 6 months

requiredDocuments.name: Bank statement (last 3 months)
requiredDocuments.notes: stamped by bank, balance ~€3,000 equivalent recommended

requiredDocuments.name: Leave approval letter
requiredDocuments.notes: from employer, company letterhead, mentioning travel dates

requiredDocuments.name: Confirmed return flight ticket
requiredDocuments.notes: do not purchase actual ticket — use reservation only until visa approved

requiredDocuments.name: Hotel booking confirmation
requiredDocuments.notes: for entire stay, refundable bookings accepted

requiredDocuments.name: Travel insurance
requiredDocuments.notes: minimum €30,000 medical coverage, valid across entire Schengen area for full duration

requiredDocuments.name: Cover letter
requiredDocuments.notes: purpose of travel, day-by-day plan, ties to India

commonRejectionReasons: Suspicious itinerary (too many countries in too few days)
Insufficient ties to home country (no leave letter, no property, no family proof)
consulateFirstEntryRule: Apply at the consulate of the country you'll spend the most time in, or first enter if equal.
disclaimer: Acid-test placeholder data — verify against official VFS / consulate before relying on for an actual application.
